hints.text: Very limited coverage: **Kampala + Entebbe + national parks** (map)
Plates: **white front / yellow rear**, long or tall

shared_with.note: Kenya also has white front + yellow rear plates.
shared_with.diff: Kampala boxy car → Uganda; follow-SUV → Kenya.

hints.text: **Kampala Google car**: white, boxy, square side mirrors — unique to Kampala & outskirts
Busy look: many signs, narrow unpaved roads, small 1-storey houses behind **walls + barbed wire**; soil **very red** (even paved roads have a red/purple/pink tinge); city is **very hilly**
**Taxi buses w/ a blue blocky side pattern** everywhere; city centre = richer, multi-storey, **black-white kerbs**
**Entebbe** (SW of Kampala): feels emptier, greener, fancier houses, **significantly more street signs**
**National-park car**: like Kampala's but w/ a **black bar along the front** (visibility varies, often invisible)
**Kidepo NP** (NE): big savanna w/ mountains in most directions — most recognisable range east; north road: forested south half, savanna north half w/ a **wide mountain to the north**

**Murchison Falls NP** (N end of Lake Albert): **low dirt barriers along the roads**; savanna west, small trees/bushes east, only a low wide range far west; **palms → almost certainly northern Murchison**

**Kibale NP**: 3 coverage types — the country's **widest dirt road** through dense tropical forest; a small car-width forest road (bright); tiny dark forest paths; **Semuliki NP** = two parallel humid forest paths, often **water drops on the lens**
**Lake Mburo NP** (W of Lake Victoria): by far the **driest** coverage — completely dried-out grass + dry bushes, hilly but not mountainous

**Mt Elgon NP** (Kenyan border): western path = forest w/ steep upslope east + very dark red dirt; eastern path = small palm-like trees on open hills + a **rifle-carrying man in green** following the trekker

**Queen Elizabeth NP** (N of Lake Edward): one of the only places w/ **non-red (brown/grey) dirt**; tree-shaped **cacti**; water-filled **craters** (north, nowhere else); the only paved road outside Kampala (white outers + yellow middle, powerline east, hills north); **Katwe** = the only real village w/ coverage outside Kampala
